landing.title: Patient portal
landing.body: Sign in using your clinic link, e.g. app.example.com/clinic-name/patient, or with email or CPF on that same clinic page. If your link has no clinic segment in the URL, ask the front desk for the full address or a new invite.

enter.error: Invalid or expired link. Ask your clinic for a new one.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter the email or CPF on file with your clinic. If you already set a portal password, you can use it; otherwise we'll send a code to your email and, when configured, WhatsApp.
login.identifierHint: Use the same email or CPF you gave the clinic at registration or self-signup.
login.identifierInvalid: Enter a valid email or an 11-digit CPF.
login.passwordHint: Account {account} — enter the password you set during signup or in the portal.
login.passwordFailed: Could not sign in. Check your password.
login.sendOtpHint: Identity: {account}. We'll send a 6-digit code to the contact on file with your clinic.
login.codeSent: If this email or CPF is registered, you'll receive a code shortly. Check email and messages.
login.requestFailed: Could not send the code. Try again.
login.haveLink: I already have my clinic link

setPassword.title: Set a new password
setPassword.description: Choose a strong password to sign in with email or CPF and password next time.
setPassword.needLogin: Your session expired or is invalid. Sign in again using your clinic link or email/CPF and password.

passwordDialog.descriptionChange: Enter your current password and your new password.
passwordDialog.descriptionCreate: Set a password to sign in with email or CPF and password.
passwordDialog.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.description: Records of your care journey at the clinic.
timeline.capped: Partial list — more events may exist in history.
timeline.portalFileSubmitted: You uploaded a document (under clinic review)
timeline.portalFileRejected: Document not accepted by the clinic

home.accessSubtitle: Follow your stages, documents, and updates from your clinic in one place. Access works with the invite you received or with the email or CPF on file.
home.accessStepsHint: You can use either option below.
home.accessStepLink: Open the link your clinic sent (email, WhatsApp, or SMS). The address should include the clinic name in the path.
home.accessStepCpf: Or tap “Sign in”, enter the email or CPF on file with your clinic, and use the code we send to your email and, when enabled, WhatsApp.
home.noJourney: There is no active care journey right now. Your clinic will guide next steps.
home.journeyDescription: Your treatment stages and progress on the pathway your clinic has set up.
home.loadError: Could not load your data. Try signing out and opening the link again.
home.readOnlyJourneyHint: Stages, checklist, and journey changes are managed by your clinic team. You can follow progress here; only your personal details can be edited by you.

files.title: Documents
files.description: Clinic files and your uploads. New uploads are reviewed before download is enabled.
